expectations.text: Clearly declares which prompt is better (should be B)
Provides numerical scores for both prompts across dimensions
expectations.evidence: Prompt A: D (30/100) with all 6 dimension scores. Prompt B: A (85/100) with all 6 dimension scores.

expectations.text: Shows per-dimension differences between the two prompts
expectations.evidence: Shows deltas: Specificity +75, Constraint Control +75, Completeness +60, Context +60, Clarity +45, Actionability +35

expectations.text: Explains specifically WHY the winner is better with concrete reasoning
expectations.evidence: 5 detailed reasons: Role Assignment (+30 Context), Enumerated Categories (+75 Specificity), Concrete Examples (+30 Specificity), Structured Output (+75 Constraint Control), and implicit RISE framework

expectations.text: Identifies the prompting techniques used in Prompt B (Role Assignment, Structured Output, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Identifies 5 techniques: Role Assignment, Explicit Instruction, Precision Drill, Structured Output, RISE Framework

expectations.text: Suggests how the winning prompt could be further improved
expectations.evidence: 4 improvement suggestions: Negative Constraint (+5), Definition Lock severity scale (+3), Delimiter Pattern (+3), edge case handling (+3). Estimated S-tier score: 94/100
